ground_truth.title: Staple Tee - 5001
ground_truth.main_content:
The AS Colour Staple Tee. Enduring comfort in a regular fit, crafted from 5.3 oz 100% combed cotton. Featuring neck ribbing, side seams, and double needle hems for durability and minimal shrinkage, it's a timeless choice for comfort and style. Available in 70+ colours. Built to last.

Details

Fit
Regular

Fabric
Mid weight, 5.3 oz, 28-singles, 100% combed cotton (heathers 15% viscose)

Construction
Neck ribbing, side seamed, shoulder to shoulder tape, double needle hems, preshrunk to minimise shrinkage

Embellishment
Suited for screen printing, DTG and embroidery

Certifications
